title: Waystones Emissive
description: Waystones with emissive labPBR texture for shaders
body:
![Waystones Emissive logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6732284165e8b87761481a1b8d4a31cdc7b488f7_0.webp)
-----------

This resource pack adds emissive textures with labPBR format to [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones) !

I recommend using [No Resource Pack Warnings](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-resource-pack-warnings)

Waystones PBR is available [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/waystones-pbr)
